THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRINICH, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDSTEIN, WILLIAM $6,201.68 PRINCIPAL, $344.83 INTEREST, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,696.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-18-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL GRINICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLAM GOLDSTEIN IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT CALLED THE COURTHOUSE ASKING FOR A CONTINUANCE DUE TO A MEDICAL EMERGENCY. HONORABLE CURTIS SMOLER ALLOWS THE CONTINUANCE WITH NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
